channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: House set to vote on ICE funding, ending prolonged deadlock
item.description: The House will vote on a $70 billion Republican bill to fund immigration enforcement agencies for the remainder of the Trump administration.

item.title: DOJ says EEOC broke law by pushing employers toward race-based choices
item.description: The Justice Department stated that the EEOC violated civil rights laws through guidelines that coerced employers into making race-based decisions.

item.title: Rahm Emanuel's challenging campaign in New Hampshire tests a potential 2028 presidential run
New York's train station to get $8B renovation with columns, sunlight, and Trump's name
item.description: Amtrak and developers have released renderings of a dramatically redesigned Pennsylvania Station in New York City.
